Get Your Professional Commercial Finance Quote

Secure strategic finance solutions tailored for your commercial business. Complete our comprehensive assessment for personalised quotes on equipment finance, commercial property, working capital, and business growth solutions.

✓ Licensed Australian Finance Broker ✓ ASIC Compliant Service ✓ Confidential Assessment Process

Professional Assessment Process

1

Complete Assessment

Provide your business and finance requirements through our comprehensive assessment form.

2

Professional Analysis

Licensed finance brokers analyse your requirements and assess optimal finance solutions.

3

Strategic Recommendations

Receive personalised quotes with strategic guidance and transparent terms within 24 hours.

4

Partnership Support

Ongoing professional support through application, approval, and settlement processes.

Complete this comprehensive assessment to receive personalised commercial finance quotes. All information is treated confidentially and assessed by licensed Australian finance professionals.

Why Commercial Businesses Choose EVFBS

🛡️

Licensed & Regulated

Australian Credit Licence holder, fully ASIC compliant with professional indemnity insurance and regulatory oversight.

⚡

Commercial Trades Specialist

Deep expertise in commercial trades, civil contractors, and industrial businesses. We understand your industry's unique challenges.

🎯

Strategic Assessment

Comprehensive analysis using AI-enhanced financial intelligence to provide optimal finance structuring and terms.

🔒

Confidential Process

All information is treated with strict confidentiality. Secure data handling and professional discretion guaranteed.

💰

Transparent Pricing

Clear fee structure with no hidden costs. Competitive rates and transparent terms in all quote recommendations.

🤝

Partnership Approach

Ongoing support throughout the finance process and beyond. Strategic guidance for sustainable business growth.

Your Data Protection & Privacy

Secure Data Handling: All submitted information is encrypted and stored securely in compliance with Australian Privacy Principles.
Professional Confidentiality: Your business information is treated with strict confidentiality and professional discretion.
Limited Use: Information is used solely for finance assessment and quote generation. No data is shared without explicit consent.
Your Rights: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information at any time.

Credit Guide: Our Credit Guide contains important information about your rights and obligations, as well as our services and fees.
